title: Death Coordinates Viewer
body:
Worried about losing your items after death in Minecraft?

With **_Death Coordinates Viewer_**, your coordinates will appear in chat right after you die!

Finding your items is now way simpler.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/N78A86SI5wk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
